reasoning_content: Let me just rebuild and rerun the score to verify the fix works. The issue was clear - clang uses `exclaim` for `!` instead of `not`. Let me rebuild.

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC/build && cmake --build . -t task1 2>&1 && cmake --build . -t task1-score 2>&1 | tail -30
